title: briza poimorpha
intro: Briza poimorpha, also known as Purple Quaking-grass, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be attributed to its essential oils and flavonoids. The health benefits of Briza poimorpha include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and improve respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. Briza poimorpha can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
